node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('package.json','utf8')); if (pkg.name !== 'nanostores') throw new Error('Unexpected package name: '+pkg.name); const atom=fs.readFileSync('atom/index.js','utf8'); const computed=fs.readFileSync('computed/index.js','utf8'); if (!atom.includes('globalThis.nanostoresEpoch')) throw new Error('Global epoch storage missing'); if (!atom.includes('export const NANOSTORES_EPOCH')) throw new Error('Shared epoch export missing'); if (!computed.includes('NANOSTORES_EPOCH.epoch')) throw new Error('Computed store shared epoch usage missing');"
